note: Shipped-but-flagged items for the joint review pass: street alternates (possible step-free paths, never auto-applied) and unvalidated elevators (no guidance text).

flags.name: Framingham
flags.detail: The elevator at Framingham connecting the Inbound and Outbound platforms is out of service. Please proceed to Concord street to cross over to the outbound platform.

flags.name: Framingham

flags.name: South Acton
flags.detail: To travel from the Fitchburg platform to the North Station platform, travel to the east end of the platform and proceed down the ramp to the small parking lot. Continue east on Railroad St to Main St.

flags.name: South Acton
flags.detail: To travel from the North Station platform to the Fitchburg platform, travel east on Maple St towards Main St. At Main St, turn left and continue to Railroad St. At Railroad St, turn left and continue

flags.name: Natick Center
flags.detail: To exit: Go to the east end of the platform. Take the ramp to Washington St. To board: Go east on North Ave for one block. Turn right on Washington St. Take the ramp to theÂ Track 1 platform.

flags.name: Natick Center
flags.detail: To exit: Go to the east end of the platform. Take the ramp to Washington St.\nTo board: Go south on Main St. Turn left on South Ave and go one block. Turn left on Washington St. Take the ramp to the T

flags.name: Ball Square
flags.detail: To exit, proceed to the track crossing located at the south end of the platform, then continue to the Boston Ave lobby. To board, use the Boston Ave entrance located at the intersection of Boston Ave

flags.name: Union Square
flags.detail: To board or exit, use the accessible walkway that connects the station entrance with Prospect St.

flags.name: East Taunton
flags.detail: To exit: Go to the north end of the platform. Take the ramp to the parking lot.\nTo board: Take the path near the accessible drop-off/pick-up area. Take the ramp to the platform.
